title: Outlive: Science & Art of Longevity
hook_question: Are we training for the wrong metrics in our current longevity regimens?
takeaway_pill: True longevity requires prioritizing healthspan alongside lifespan, focusing on cardiorespiratory fitness (VO2 max) and muscle mass as primary protective shields against the chronic diseases of aging.
content: Peter Attia's *Outlive* advocates shifting from reactive Medicine 2.0 to proactive Medicine 3.0. His core premise: modern medicine excels at postponing death but fails at extending **healthspan**. Preventing the 'four horsemen' of aging—cardiovascular disease, cancer, neurodegeneration, and **metabolic syndrome**—requires building **cardiorespiratory fitness** and muscle mass through Zone 2 training and strength work. To stay functional in your 80s and 90s, you have to train for it decades earlier.

evidence_table.outcome: Elite cardiorespiratory fitness associated with a 5-fold reduction in all-cause mortality vs low performers.

bibliography.text: Attia P. Outlive: The Science and Art of Longevity. Harmony Books; 2023.
